bundles.summary: Anthropic published a rare post-mortem regarding quality slippage in Claude Code, identifying root causes in the Agent SDK harness and system prompt isolation. Fixes deployed in v2.1.116+.
bundles.title: Quality Regression Post-Mortem & Fixes

bundles.summary: Anthropic released 'Memory' for Claude Managed Agents (public beta) and added support for this feature to the built-in `claude-api` skill in Claude Code.
bundles.title: Managed Agents Memory & Skill Integration

bundles.summary: Specific fixes for WebFetch stalls on huge pages, Proxy 204 crashes, and intermittent API 400s from cache-control races.
bundles.title: Concurrency & Harness Reliability Fixes
